epigraph.quote: Twider yanked the lead out of Simon's hand & chased sheep, got caught in bracken & re-captured. Bloody dog.

per_stop.quote: We drove up to the 3rd lake in the Elan Valley, cycled down to the 2nd dam (which we reached 2 years ago). It was a nice ride
In the van on the way to the farm now to pick up the smalls & keep them at 86 until Tuesday.
